items.title: [正面] Aside from being inspired mainly by Cthulhu Mythos...
items.summary:
Aside from being inspired mainly by Cthulhu Mythos, this game has its own story originality. Plus, the character arts are pretty unique in a way where imperfection are beauty as well. Combat is fun. Storytelling is decent but since story is translated by ChatGPT, many lines are a little stiff and weird. However, if you can get past that part, you would enjoy the game probably.



**Spoiler (Dont read past this part if you are not okay):**
Also, considering Silver is considered holy, it never crossed my mind that Silver in Cthulhu Mythos can be used as a force for good. However this game used Silver as a symbol for light, knowledge, and Resurrection. Yog-Sothoth is the only outer god linked to the Silver Key and Silver Gate. Although his name isn't explicitly stated in Morimens, you can get the gist of it if you know the Cthulhu Mythos. Since Yog-Sothoth is the "All in One and One for All", Tawil refers Yog-Sothoth with only capital pronoun just like in Christianity's respect to God. Quite a nice touch and combination.

items.title:
[正面] 先說我是玩官方PC版的，所以在steam上遊戲時數很少。
這款遊戲真的是我玩過最好玩的PVE卡牌遊...
items.summary:
先說我是玩官方PC版的，所以在steam上遊戲時數很少。
這款遊戲真的是我玩過最好玩的PVE卡牌遊戲，而且PVP也不錯玩。
畫風非常棒，角色設計也贏過大部分市面上的二游，大部分角色都是那種一眼就會印象深刻的形象（尤其是要看全身圖的立繪），喜歡克系畫風的玩家絕對不能錯過。
然後遊戲機制也非常有趣，可以說是我見過的卡牌遊戲裡最有趣的機制，玩起來非常上癮，完全不輸那些單機卡牌神作。
